signals: AI enabling one engineer to deliver across frontend, backend, and product tasks
Smaller teams expected to move faster

workflow_change.before: Worked across the stack but still relied on separate specialists for some design, copy, and implementation support.
workflow_change.after: Uses AI for code scaffolding, copy drafts, SQL help, debugging, and sometimes product planning support.

actions: Expanded scope into product and architecture decisions
Learned to validate across more domains

outcome.early_effect: Output increased significantly, but role boundaries became less clear and cognitive load rose.

narrative.summary: AI has made startup engineering more leveraged, but also more compressed. One person can cover more ground, which raises both opportunity and pressure.
